scripts.setup: npm run install:frontends && npm run restore:backend
scripts.install:frontends: npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Candidato install && npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Empleador install && npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Admin install
scripts.dev:frontends: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n candidato,empleador,admin -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:candidato" "npm run dev:empleador" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,candidato,empleador,admin -c yellow,green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:candidato" "npm run dev:empleador" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:frontends: npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Candidato run build && npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Empleador run build && npm --prefix frontend/frontend-Admin run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontends
